# Strategy (False Foundations)

This section collects focused strategy guides for **False Foundations**.

This script rewards players who can:

- recognize structural anomalies
- adapt to changing game conditions
- question both information and outcomes

---

## 🧠 Strategy Focus

Strategy in False Foundations revolves around:

- identifying the type of game being played
- interpreting unreliable or distorted information
- making careful endgame decisions under uncertainty

## 🧭 Recommended Starting Point

1. Recognize whether the game structure is normal
2. Evaluate how much information can be trusted
3. Slow down and reassess before final executions

---

## 🧠 Key Insight

> **In False Foundations, the best strategy is not to solve faster — it is to recognize when your assumptions are wrong.**
